hooks.command: if (-not $env:MC_TASK_ID -or -not $env:MC_API_URL) { exit 0 }; $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $taskId = [System.Uri]::EscapeDataString($env:MC_TASK_ID); $url = "$($env:MC_API_URL)/api/hooks/codex?taskId=$taskId&hookEvent=UserPromptSubmit"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $($env:MC_API_TOKEN)"; "X-Mission-Control-Runtime" = "electron-local" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Body $payload -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null } catch {}

if (-not $env:MC_TASK_ID -or -not $env:MC_API_URL) { exit 0 }; $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $taskId = [System.Uri]::EscapeDataString($env:MC_TASK_ID); $url = "$($env:MC_API_URL)/api/hooks/codex?taskId=$taskId&hookEvent=Stop"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $($env:MC_API_TOKEN)"; "X-Mission-Control-Runtime" = "electron-local" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Body $payload -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null } catch {}

if (-not $env:MC_TASK_ID -or -not $env:MC_API_URL) { exit 0 }; $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $taskId = [System.Uri]::EscapeDataString($env:MC_TASK_ID); $url = "$($env:MC_API_URL)/api/hooks/codex?taskId=$taskId&hookEvent=PermissionRequest"; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $($env:MC_API_TOKEN)"; "X-Mission-Control-Runtime" = "electron-local" }; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Body $payload -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null } catch {}
